description: Rules for non-linear Solaris LOP topologies — when to merge vs chain, ROP terminal behavior, and canonical ordering within DAGs.

rules.description: Merge nodes combine separate USD layer streams (parallel asset pipelines, department outputs). Individual scene elements (cameras, lights, materials) chain LINEARLY — they do NOT need merging.
rules.wrong: rectlight_key → merge ← rectlight_fill (lights are not separate USD layers)

rules.description: usdrender_rop is a RopNode with maxNumOutputs=0. Nothing can wire after it. It branches off the main chain — it does NOT continue it.
rules.correct: karmarenderproperties → OUTPUT null (display) AND karmarenderproperties → usdrender_rop (branch)
rules.wrong: karmarenderproperties → usdrender_rop → OUTPUT null (invalid — ROP has zero outputs)

rules.description: Display flag goes on the OUTPUT null at the end of the main chain. ROP nodes cannot receive display flags (they are RopNode, not LopNode).

After any merge or source node, the render tail follows FORGE Pattern 1 order: materiallibrary → camera → domelight → karmarenderproperties → OUTPUT null, with usdrender_rop branching off karmarenderproperties.
layoutChildren() must be called AFTER all nodes are created and ALL connections are wired. Calling it mid-construction produces messy layouts.
In merge nodes, input 0 has the strongest USD composition opinion. Wire geometry first (input 0), then lights, then referenced assets. Gaps in input indices produce warnings.

templates.multi_asset_merge: N geo streams → merge → materiallibrary → camera → domelight → karma → OUTPUT null (+ ROP branch). Merge is valid: combining parallel asset streams.
templates.sublayer_stack: N sublayer refs → merge → karma → OUTPUT null (+ ROP branch). Merge is valid: combining separate USD layers.
templates.render_pass_split: Scene input null → N × (karma → ROP). Fan-out for multi-pass rendering.
templates.lighting_rig: Scene input null → domelight → key → fill → karma → OUTPUT null (+ ROP branch). Lights chain LINEARLY.

constraints: NEVER merge individual lights — chain them linearly
NEVER wire anything after usdrender_rop — it has zero outputs
ALWAYS include karmarenderproperties in a renderable scene
ALWAYS include materiallibrary — scenes without materials render as grey default
ALWAYS call layoutChildren() after all connections are complete
ALWAYS set display flag on OUTPUT null, not on ROP
test_criteria: Build a 3-stream multi_asset_merge template in /stage. Verify: (1) 10 nodes created. (2) karma_settings outputs to both OUTPUT and render. (3) Display flag on OUTPUT null. (4) No merge nodes for lights. (5) Canonical order: matlib → camera → domelight → karma → OUTPUT. (6) Layout clean after layoutChildren().
